name: Irving Super Pawn & Gun
description_short: Super Pawn is a multi-location DFW pawn chain offering collateral loans from $20–$20,000 with no credit check on jewelry, electronics, firearms, and luxury goods.
description_long:
Super Pawn is a Texas-based pawn chain with four locations across the Dallas–Fort Worth metroplex: Irving, two Dallas locations (Frankford Rd. and Abrams Rd.), and Arlington. The company markets itself as one of Texas' most trusted pawn shops and holds a 4.8/5 rating across 421 customer reviews. It accepts a wide range of high-value collateral and serves customers seeking fast liquidity without a credit application.

Super Pawn offers three core transactions: pawn loans, outright purchases, and resale of pawned goods. Loan amounts range from $20 to $20,000 with no stated credit check requirement — only a government-issued photo ID. Accepted collateral includes gold jewelry and bullion, diamond and gemstone pieces, luxury watches (Rolex, Patek Philippe, Cartier, Omega), designer handbags (Gucci, Louis Vuitton), firearms (Glock, Smith & Wesson, Ruger, Springfield), electronics (Apple products, cameras, gaming systems), musical instruments, and general tools and appliances. The company also operates an eBay storefront to resell acquired inventory.

Several features differentiate Super Pawn from typical single-location pawn shops. A 24/7 online appraisal estimator lets customers get preliminary offers before visiting. A mobile app allows borrowers to monitor active loans and make payments remotely. The company advertises cash disbursement in under 10 minutes and claims no hidden fees. With four DFW locations and a toll-free number, it operates more like a regional chain than a standalone shop, offering some consistency in appraisal expertise and processes.

Super Pawn is a legitimate option for asset-rich consumers who need fast cash and cannot or prefer not to use traditional credit. The primary caveat is that loan interest rates and fee structures are not disclosed on the website, which makes cost comparison difficult before visiting. As with all pawn lending, the loan amount is capped by the shop's appraisal of collateral — not the borrower's stated need — and unredeemed items are forfeited. Customers with high-value jewelry, firearms, or luxury goods will find the most utility here; those without eligible collateral are not served.
address: 580 S Belt Line Rd, Irving, TX 75060

company_info.headquarters: 580 S Belt Line Rd, Irving, TX 75060

pros: Loans up to $20,000 — unusually high ceiling for a pawn lender
No credit check required — only a valid government-issued photo ID
Cash disbursed in under 10 minutes per the company's own claim
24/7 online appraisal estimator available before visiting a branch
Mobile app lets borrowers monitor loans and make payments remotely
4.8/5 rating from 421 reviews — strong customer satisfaction signal
Accepts a broad range of high-value collateral including firearms, luxury watches, and designer bags
cons: Loan interest rates and fee schedules are not disclosed anywhere on the website
Loan value is capped by the shop's collateral appraisal — borrowers without eligible assets cannot be served
Only four locations, all in the DFW metroplex — not accessible to most Texas residents
Items are forfeited if loans are not repaid; redemption period terms are not stated online
Firearm transactions are subject to federal background check requirements, which may add time for gun buyers
best_for: DFW-area residents who own jewelry, gold, or luxury goods and need same-day cash without a credit check
Firearm owners in the Irving, Dallas, or Arlington area looking to buy, sell, or pawn guns
Consumers who want to sell luxury watches or designer accessories quickly without listing fees or wait times
Borrowers who have been declined by traditional lenders and have tangible assets as collateral
diagnosis: Irving Super Pawn is best suited for DFW residents who own high-value portable assets — jewelry, gold, luxury watches, electronics, or firearms — and need fast cash without a credit application or income verification. The main caveat is that loan costs (interest and fee rates) are not published online, so borrowers must visit a branch to understand the true cost of borrowing before committing.
services: No-credit-check cash loans with government ID only
Gold and bullion buying and appraisal
Diamond, gemstone, and fine jewelry buying
Luxury watch buying (Rolex, Omega, Patek Philippe, Cartier, Breitling)
Firearms buying and selling (Glock, Smith & Wesson, Ruger, Springfield, and more)
Electronics buying (Apple products, gaming systems, cameras, TVs, tools)
Designer accessories buying (Gucci, Louis Vuitton, Versace, Dolce & Gabbana)
Musical instruments buying (guitars, brass, woodwinds, keyboards)
Mobile app for loan monitoring and payments
eBay resale storefront for purchased inventory
meta_description: Multi-location pawn chain offering collateral loans from $20–$20,000 with no credit check on jewelry, electronics, firearms, and luxury goods.
